## Verification

<!-- List commands run and results. If not run, explain why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for all changed behaviour
- [ ] `make lint` passes locally
- [ ] `make test` passes locally (including `-race`)
- [ ] Docs updated if the change affects user-facing behaviour or architecture
- [ ] If user-facing CLI behaviour changed, the shipped plugin (`skills/**`) and docs are updated to match — verified before merge
- [ ] No secrets, PATs, or credentials committed (check `.gitignore` exclusions)
- [ ] No internal hostnames, page IDs, or employer-specific references in code or docs
